messages.message: `'` can be escaped with `'`, `‘`, `'`, `’`.

fix.text:
Founded in 2024, Prinvox was built to solve this. We've created a secure, real-time 
                ecosystem where quality is verified, intellectual property is protected, and 
                manufacturing happens right in your neighborhood.

suggestions.desc: Replace with `'`.

fix.text:
Founded in 2024, Prinvox was built to solve this. We‘ve created a secure, real-time 
                ecosystem where quality is verified, intellectual property is protected, and 
                manufacturing happens right in your neighborhood.

suggestions.desc: Replace with `‘`.

fix.text:
Founded in 2024, Prinvox was built to solve this. We've created a secure, real-time 
                ecosystem where quality is verified, intellectual property is protected, and 
                manufacturing happens right in your neighborhood.

suggestions.desc: Replace with `'`.

fix.text:
Founded in 2024, Prinvox was built to solve this. We’ve created a secure, real-time 
                ecosystem where quality is verified, intellectual property is protected, and 
                manufacturing happens right in your neighborhood.

suggestions.desc: Replace with `’`.

source:
'use client'; import Navbar from '@/components/Navbar'; import Image from 'next/image'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { Printer, ShieldCheck, Zap, Globe, Heart, Rocket } from 'lucide-react'; import Link from 'next/link'; const values = [ { icon: , title: "IP Protection", desc: "Your designs are encrypted and only accessible to the vendors you choose for quoting." }, { icon: , title: "Local Manufacturing", desc: "We prioritize local vendors to reduce shipping times and carbon footprint." }, { icon: , title: "Instant Quotes", desc: "Get real-time feedback on your designs and competitive bids within hours." } ]; export default function AboutPage() { return (
{/* Hero */}
Our Mission DEMOCRATIZING
PRODUCTION. Prinvox is the bridge between digital imagination and physical reality. We empower designers to manufacture locally and vendors to scale their craft.
{/* Story Section */}

THE PRINVOX PHILOSOPHY

Traditional manufacturing is slow, expensive, and exclusive. 3D printing changed the game, but connecting designers with reliable production remained a challenge.

Founded in 2024, Prinvox was built to solve this. We've created a secure, real-time ecosystem where quality is verified, intellectual property is protected, and manufacturing happens right in your neighborhood.

500+
Verified Vendors
12K+
Success Prints
{/* Values */}
{values.map((v, i) => (
{v.icon}

{v.title}

{v.desc}

 ))}
{/* CTA */}

Ready to Join the
Revolution?

Start Printing Join as Vendor
{/* Footer */}
PRINVOX

┬⌐ 2026 Prinvox ΓÇö Future of Manufacturing

); }

source:
'use client'; import Link from 'next/link'; import Navbar from '@/components/Navbar'; import Image from 'next/image'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { PRODUCT_CATEGORIES } from '@/lib/categories'; import { ArrowRight, ChevronRight, Cpu, ShieldCheck, Zap, BarChart3, Layers, Printer, Package, CheckCircle2, Users } from 'lucide-react'; const workflowSteps = [ { title: "Secure Design Upload", desc: "Your intellectual property is safe. Upload STL/OBJ files with instant 3D validation.", image: "/landing/step_design.jfif", icon: }, { title: "Competitive Bidding", desc: "Send your design to a network of verified local vendors. Compare price and quality.", image: "/landing/step_bid.jfif", icon: }, { title: "Live Production Tracking", desc: "Monitor your print's progress in real-time with live status updates from the workshop.", image: "/landing/step_build.jfif", icon: }, { title: "Verified Delivery", desc: "Receive your custom parts, quality checked and delivered to your doorstep.", image: "/landing/step_delivery.jfif", icon: } ]; const statItems = [ { value: '500+', label: 'Active Vendors', icon: }, { value: '12K+', label: 'Prints Delivered', icon: }, { value: '98%', label: 'Satisfaction', icon: }, { value: '24h', label: 'Response Time', icon: }, ]; export default function HomePage() { return (
{/* --- HERO SECTION --- */}
{/* Abstract Background Elements */}
The Future of Manufacturing is Here

PRINT YOUR
IMAGINATION.

India's premier 3D printing ecosystem. Connect with expert vendors, track live production, and bring your designs to life with industrial precision.

Get Started Now Marketplace
{/* Hero Visual */}
{/* Overlay Card */}
Active Print
Vase_Project_01
Progress 84%
{/* --- STATS SECTION --- */}
{statItems.map((item, i) => (
{item.icon}
{item.value}
{item.label}
 ))}
{/* --- WORKFLOW SECTION --- */}

HOW PRINVOX WORKS

From a digital file to a physical masterpiece. We've streamlined the entire 3D manufacturing lifecycle.

{workflowSteps.map((step, i) => (
{step.icon}
Step {i + 1}

{step.title}

{step.desc}

))}
{/* --- MARKETPLACE PREVIEW SECTION --- */}

EXPLORE THE MARKET

Browse thousands of ready-to-ship models from our top-rated vendor collections.

View All Categories
{PRODUCT_CATEGORIES.slice(0, 6).map((cat, i) => (
{cat.emoji}
{cat.id}
))}
{/* --- VENDOR CTA SECTION --- */}

OWN A 3D PRINTER?
START EARNING.

Join India's fastest growing additive manufacturing network. Get access to global orders, live dashboard management, and secure payments.

Apply as Vendor
Verified Network
{/* Mini Stats Card */}
{[ { label: "Commission", val: "Only 10%", color: "border-violet-500/30 bg-violet-500/10" }, { label: "Payouts", val: "Instantly", color: "border-emerald-500/30 bg-emerald-500/10" }, { label: "Orders", val: "Global", color: "border-cyan-500/30 bg-cyan-600/10" }, { label: "Support", val: "24/7 Priority", color: "border-amber-500/30 bg-amber-600/10" } ].map((item) => (
{item.label}
{item.val}
))}
{/* --- FOOTER --- */}
PRINVOX

Revolutionizing custom manufacturing through decentralized 3D printing. The bridge between complex digital designs and physical reality.

Marketplace

  • Browse Products
  • Collections
  • Verified Vendors

Platform

  • How it Works
  • Become a Vendor
  • Terms of Service

┬⌐ 2026 Prinvox Ecosystem. All Rights Reserved.

{/* Social Icons Placeholder */}
); }
